name: Potential Configuration And Service Reconnaissance
notes:
This rule detects reconnaissance attempts from the registry. Adversaries may interact with the Windows registry to gather information about credentials, the system, configuration, and installed software.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Query Registry
SIGMA Description: Adversaries may interact with the Windows Registry to gather information about credentials, the system, configuration, and installed software.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of reg.exe
when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%query%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%save%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%export%' AQL filter query

when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%currentVersion\windows%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%winlogon\%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%currentversion\shellserviceobjectdelayload%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%currentVersion\run%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%currentVersion\policies\explorer\run%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%currentcontrolset\services%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Potential Configuration And Service Reconnaissance on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of reg.exe
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%query%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%save%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%export%' AQL filter query

AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%currentVersion\windows%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%winlogon\%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%currentversion\shellserviceobjectdelayload%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%currentVersion\run%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%currentVersion\policies\explorer\run%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%currentcontrolset\services%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Potential Configuration And Service Reconnaissance

Event description: Detects reconnaissance information attempts from the registry. Adversaries may interact with the Windows registry to gather information about credentials, the system, configuration, and installed software.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
